description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a smooth, slightly ribbed orange surface and a short, greenish-brown stem at the top. The front face is intricately carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring two triangular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth, giving it a mischievous expression. The carving is clean and symmetrical, with sharp edges that contrast against the pumpkin's natural curves. The rest of the pumpkin is uncarved, maintaining its natural orange color and subtle surface texture. The stem is centrally positioned and appears sturdy, typical of a freshly harvested pumpkin. There are no visible decorative accessories or additional markings on the pumpkin.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a greenish stem and a traditional jack-o'-lantern face carved on the front, featuring triangular eyes and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, and the stem visible at the top.
description_view_1: Rear angled view showing the uncarved, smooth orange surface and the stem, with the carved face barely visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the fully uncarved, ribbed orange surface and the stem at the top center.
description_view_3: Side view showing the uncarved orange surface and a slight glimpse of the carved face on the right edge, with the stem visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two triangular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth featuring pointed teeth. The pattern is symmetrical and cleanly cut, with no additional motifs or etchings.
